_meta.purpose: Demo brief — Alpine Harvest Organic Trail Mix, LATAM market. Regional adaptation with tropical flavors and vibrant visual identity.
_meta.data_origin: Created for Phase A/B final wrap-up.

cultural_context: Vibrant Latin American energy. Golden yellows, terracotta oranges, rich tropical greens. Lush tropical fruit imagery, sun-drenched warmth. Joyful and bold visual presence reflecting the diversity of Latin American markets.

products.name: Alpine Harvest Trail Mix
products.description: Classic nut and seed blend adapted for Latin American tastes — almonds, cashews, dried mango, and coconut flakes

products.name: Alpine Harvest Trail Mix
products.description: Vibrant tropical blend with macadamia nuts, dried pineapple, papaya, and toasted coconut for a taste of the tropics

audience: active families and health-conscious professionals 20-45 across Latin America
